entries: Switched to a read-only archive that preserves saved forecasts without generating new predictions.
Moved final event forecasts into the Final match flow, with an easy return to the match predictions.
Made the active match date center reliably in the date picker, including after returning to the page.
Added a Final tab with council consensus charts for ten scoring, discipline, and corner questions.
Expanded the first- and last-scoring-team questions to cover the full match, including extra time and successful penalty-shootout kicks.
Improved final forecast reliability with provider timeouts, automatic recovery, and clearer generation logs.
Added round-specific and onward-bracket context to knockout forecasts.
Clarified third-place playoff predictions so models select the team finishing third, not an advancing team.
Added tournament-wide finalist and champion forecasts from the council.
Clarified knockout scoreline charts by showing how many models backed each result.
Locked forecasts before the debate so commentary cannot change a model's pick.
Added a chart showing the council's preferred knockout scorelines.
Reduced score anchoring to encourage more independent knockout predictions.
Added predicted scorelines and advancing teams for knockout matches.
Refined prediction prompts to put forecast accuracy ahead of commentary.
Kept Qwen predictions available during temporary provider errors.
Allowed models to predict draws in knockout matches.
Ignored invalid incoming score values to keep match data reliable.
Improved the selected-match layout and made flags render consistently.
Added per-model and total API spending to the leaderboard.
Fixed stale prediction results and strengthened handling of external match data.
Added a group filter to the standings page.
Replaced emoji flags with reliable flag images across browsers.
Simplified model bubbles by removing recent prediction-history indicators.
Fixed small-screen table overlap and match-picker dismissal.
Added a knockout tab with a round-by-round bracket view.
Added each model's five most recent prediction outcomes.
Added group-stage standings for all World Cup groups.
Added a persistent tab bar that shows the current page.
Made it possible to see which models backed each vote-bar result.
Added a council debate flow where models can react to earlier picks.
Redesigned predictions as chat bubbles with model icons and a vote bar.
Launched The VAR Council with match syncing and model predictions.
